recommendations.title: Not One Less
recommendations.overview: Set in the People's Republic of China during the 1990s, the film centers on a 13-year-old substitute teacher, Wei Minzhi, in the Chinese countryside. Called in to substitute for a village teacher for one month, Wei is told not to lose any students.

recommendations.title: Brotherhood of Blades
recommendations.overview: In the late Ming Dynasty, three sworn brothers who serve as the imperial secret police are dispatched to hunt down Wei Zhongxian, a eunuch politician who had been forced to resign from his influential post and exiled from Beijing. The brothers return

recommendations.title: The Replacement Killers
recommendations.overview: Hired assassin John Lee is asked by Chinatown crime boss Terence Wei to murder the young son of policeman Stan Zedkov. Lee has the boy in his sights, but his conscience gets the better of him, and he spares the child's life. Afraid that Wei will take

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Murderer
recommendations.overview: A former serial killer with Alzheimer's fights to protect his daughter from her mysterious boyfriend who may be a serial killer too.

recommendations.title: Lucy
recommendations.overview: A woman, accidentally caught in a dark deal, turns the tables on her captors and transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

recommendations.title: Flight Crew
recommendations.overview: A story about bravery, self-sacrifice and human dignity put on trial by the merciless power of nature. A young pilot is fired from military air force after disobeying an absurd order. He gets a job as a co-pilot with a civil airline. Being brutally h

recommendations.title: A Company Man
recommendations.overview: A contract killer becomes disenchanted with his line of work and spares the lives of his two latest would-be-victims. But the assassination company he works for has no intentions of letting him quit.

recommendations.title: Return of the One-Armed Swordsman
recommendations.overview: Eight demon swordsmen and their gang have spread menace across many sword teaching schools. The students seek the help of Fang who alone can combat them. Will Fang take up the challenge.

recommendations.title: Daisy
recommendations.overview: A painter in Amsterdam receives flowers from a mysterious admirer, while a hitman and cop find themselves in conflict.

recommendations.title: The Five Venoms
recommendations.overview: A dying master sends his last student to check up on five former pupils, who each know a special style of kung-fu.
